session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan #8955 implementation complete. PR: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8955
## Summary
**Bug 1 — `objective-render-roadmap` ignores status/pr:** - `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_render_roadmap.py`: Changed `_render_roadmap()` to read `status` and `pr` from input step data instead of hardcoding `"pending"` and `None`. Both the markdown table rows and `RoadmapNode` construction now use the input values (falling back to `"pending"` and `None` when absent).
**Bug 2 — Comment tables don't match validator format at creation time:** - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/plan_issues.py`: Added Step 7b in `create_objective_issue()` — after creating the comment and updating the issue body with the comment ID, call `rerender_comment_roadmap()` to normalize the roadmap tables to canonical format. If the rerendered result differs, update the comment via `update_comment()`.
**Tests added:** - 3 new tests in `test_objective_render_roadmap.py`: `test_render_roadmap_preserves_status_and_pr`, `test_render_roadmap_preserves_status_and_pr_with_depends_on`, `test_cli_preserves_status_and_pr` - 1 new round-trip invariant test in `test_objective_save_to_issue.py`: `test_create_objective_comment_passes_validation` — verifies that a newly-created objective comment is already in canonical format (the generate-validate contract)
